---

## India: DPDPA Implementation & Judicial Scrutiny

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023 has officially taken force, following the finalization of the DPDP Rules 2025 which outline the practical implementation of the law. These rules provide clarity on compliance obligations, drawing comparisons to global privacy paradigms while establishing India's unique "middle path" in data protection.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFA0MUhxR2JRbkZEUG81Smp1Uy02Z0xtdWZYSnlyLVJVSHQ2eWtleENVY2Iya2tVTUNveFE5Mm1FLUVwd01icDNwT0pqcFZyOGJVNmZSRGJoSjJUT21BOWxkOXFqTmhVRmNSVW5jSGFyQkVlblRoR2FTX01R), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihAFBVV95cUxONDh6V2U3SDY3d2UtblV1QTl4MXA4TTFoM3NxV1NiQXk5c1JDU3hQMmg2bnVjSVpPbURTdjJ3Z2NsOExteHp4dm1UNlNQa1AxUkRKSlF3bGlDRTVJcDNjWjdrT0czajFZaU5OR01MbnczSjZheUg4SWJQT04ya2RwengxdjI), [Source](https://news.google.) )

The Supreme Court has issued notices to the government regarding multiple petitions challenging the constitutionality of the DPDPA and its potential dilution of the Right to Information (RTI) Act. Public interest litigations filed by groups like the Internet Freedom Foundation and Reporters Collective argue that certain provisions of the new data protection law may undermine transparency and accountability.
([Source](https://news.google.), [Source](https://news.google.), [Source](https://news.google.), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNUXo3aUxwM1dVSWIzOUg4dzgtSkEtS210VFhhTkVIeS1KSHU4cHI0Vkd1enlUd0JKTmxHbTlpbDJyWVhPQmwzRWlpZnNXemZUcXRnOG51X0RYbGhYMElfejVJa2t4ZXhidnJEUkJaZVFLam50RkJubWo3VTJ2Q0YwSXAxVHk1UlhBSUsyVjdudk9RTEFraFhXT0M4UU5KNzZE), [Source](https://news.google.) )

Analysts continue to scrutinize the DPDPA, with some questioning whether it contains "regulatory blind spots" or leans towards a "data maximisation regime" rather than a strict data minimisation approach. These discussions highlight ongoing debates about the law's effectiveness and its alignment with global privacy principles.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxPNy1KWXF6SEZ5dW92VWluVUVKYmRnQUNpZnpsV1dDRjRFMVVvS2FhYnI2SGMyQ19pRTFMdW1kMFpD
